key.name: show-icon
key.description: Show the focused window's app icon in the panel.

key.name: show-app
key.description: Show the focused window's app name in the panel.

key.name: show-title
key.description: Show the focused window's title in the panel.

key.name: colored-icon
key.description: Show the app icon in full color instead of monochrome/desaturated.

key.name: fixed-width
key.description: Use a fixed width for the indicator instead of auto-sizing.

key.name: width
key.description: Width of the indicator as a percentage of the panel width.

key.name: icon-size
key.description: Size of the app icon in pixels.

key.name: ease-time
key.description: Duration of the fade in/out animation in milliseconds.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Which side of the top panel to place the indicator.

key.name: toggle-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to show/hide the indicator.
